coachView.name: Breadcrumb
coachView.layout:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?><ns2:layout xmlns:ns2="http://www.ibm.com/bpm/CoachDesignerNG" xmlns:ns3="http://www.ibm.com/bpm/coachview"><ns2:layoutItem xsi:type="ns2:CustomHTML" version="8550" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"><ns2:id>dc3560b8-e53e-4ee1-8768-677febf4700e</ns2:id><ns2:layoutItemId>CustomHTML1</ns2:layoutItemId><ns2:configData><ns2:id>c94e313a-db68-4965-85e8-05692aadd760</ns2:id><ns2:optionName>@customHTML.contentType</ns2:optionName><ns2:value>TEXT</ns2:value></ns2:configData><ns2:configData><ns2:id>76255f4f-c054-4bcb-80b4-0592c628fcf3</ns2:id><ns2:optionName>@customHTML.textContent</ns2:optionName><ns2:value><div class="breadcrumb_maincontentbox">
  <div class="breadcrumb-nav">
    <div class="breadcrumb-list">
      <!-- Breadcrumb items will be dynamically generated here -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div></ns2:value></ns2:configData></ns2:layoutItem></ns2:layout>

inlineScript.name: Inline Javascript
Inline CSS
